description_long: This object is a pair of heavy-duty diagonal cutting pliers, featuring robust, straight handles with a two-tone design—primarily brown with black accents. The handles are ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip and appear to be coated with a non-slip material. The jaws are short, thick, and sharply angled, designed specifically for cutting through wires and small metal rods, with a beveled edge for efficient shearing action. The pivot joint is a solid, fixed type, providing strong leverage and smooth operation. The metal components have a matte, slightly reflective finish, while the handles have a more textured, grippy surface. A brand name or marking is visible on the metal near the pivot.
description: A robust pair of diagonal cutting pliers with brown and black ergonomic handles and sharp, angled jaws for cutting wire. The handles are textured for grip, and a brand marking is visible on the metal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pliers, highlighting the brown and black ergonomic handles and the angled cutting jaws.
description_view_1: Narrow edge-on view, emphasizing the slim profile and thickness of the handles and jaws.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other face of the handles and jaws, with the brand marking visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the jaw end, showing the width and alignment of the jaws and the handle thickness.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, ergonomic handles with a slight curve, coated in brown and black non-slip material.
attribute_jaw_design: Short, thick, diagonal cutting jaws with beveled edges for shearing wire; optimized for cutting rather than gripping.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot joint, providing strong leverage without adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Handles have a textured, rubberized surface for enhanced grip.
